task_completion.description: Verify that the CAMEO Data Manager application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has opened a form to add a new resource or contact record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A blank or partially filled form for creating a new record is visible within the CAMEO Data Manager interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the Name and Category fields are filled correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Name field contains 'LZ North Complex' and the Category dropdown or field shows 'Airport' or 'Other'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Address field is filled correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Address field contains '8500 Ballpark Road, Centerville, CA 90210'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Phone field is filled correctly.
Verify the Notes field contains the exact specified safety information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Notes field contains exactly: 'CRITICAL SAFETY INFO: Primary night LZ. Surface: Grass/Clay. Dimensions: 200x200ft. HAZARDS: 40ft light poles on South side. Wires crossing road to the North. Ground contact frequency: 123.450.'

task_completion.description: Verify the new record has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The record appears in a list of resources/contacts, a success message is shown, or the form is in a saved/read-only state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the CAMEO Data Manager GUI to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the application's buttons and text fields, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to insert data.

integrity.description: Verify the application used is genuinely CAMEO Data Manager.
integrity.visual_evidence: The window title and interface clearly identify as CAMEO Data Manager, not a generic text editor or a mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't bypass the UI to edit the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of SQLite browsers, DB Browsers, or terminal scripts being used to insert the record directly into the database files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CAMEO Data Manager 4.5.1 is a real EPA software released in December 2025. The task requires adding notes containing the valid aviation frequency 123.450 MHz (designated for flight test operations). The phone number uses a fictional 555 exchange reserved for examples. EPCRA Tier II data uses XML format per EPA/NOAA national data standard v1.0.
